rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §44.0352, which governs school district competitive sealed proposal procedures for vendor selection.
quote: In selecting a vendor through competitive sealed proposals as authorized by Section 44.031(a)(2), a school district shall follow the procedures prescribed by this section.
_note: No conflict; the rule_text concerns school district procurement procedures and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
